title: Senior Software Engineer - Amazon India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Amazon India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Amazon India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Amazon India:
Amazon India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India!
